pattern: A running signed counter that closes a chunk whenever it returns to zero greedily maximizes the number of balanced pieces.
hints: A piece is balanced exactly when its count of one letter equals the count of the other; track the difference as you walk left to right.
Whenever the running difference hits zero you have just finished a balanced prefix; cutting there can never cost you a future cut.
Carry a single integer that goes up for one letter and down for the other, and increment the answer every time it crosses back to zero.

edge_inputs.description: the whole string is one indivisible balanced block
alternating letters give the maximum number of pieces
shortest balanced string in the other order
a deep imbalance must reunite into a single block, not be split early
mix of single pairs and one large block

stress.description: long random balanced string built from balanced pieces so it stays valid
stress.note: concatenating balanced blocks keeps the whole string balanced
